creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/cutting-edge/#updating-src-quick-start> exemplifies use of etcupdate(8). 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/log/documentation/content/en/books/handbook?qt=grep&q=etcupdate finds two 2021 commits. 

See also: bug 260253
